meaning: n.[前缀]不能因摩擦而生电的物质adj.不能因摩擦而生电的
examples: In that experiment, Ledoux conditioned rats to fear a bell by ringing it in time with anelectric shock until the rats froze in fear at the mere sound of thebell.
An LCD does not emit light of its own. Rather, it consists of crystal molecules. Anelectric field causes the molecules to line up in a way that alters their optical properties.
